content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported (`HomeKitWallpaperGridView.swift:2`, `HMHomeManager()` at line 6) but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI (categories list only; description mentions only 4K wallpapers).
Pierre: Apple flags HomeKit entitlement/framework usage that isn't backed by genuine home-automation features, since it grants access to sensitive home data. Here `HMHomeManager` is instantiated in a wallpaper grid that only lists categories like "Nature" and "Abstract" — there's no home, accessory, or automation UI, and the description makes no home-related claims. Remove the unused HomeKit import and `HMHomeManager` (and any HomeKit entitlement) unless you add real home-control functionality, or this may trigger review questions about entitlement misuse.
